title: VanillaFactions
description: VanillaFactions allows survival vanilla players an aesthetic way to make use of the /teams utility.
body:
# ![A titlecard that states "VanillaFactions". On both sides of the text, there is a small image of a red banner with crossed swords on it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df67e0104279b1f61d2fa0b3d14674393c33a0a1.png)

VanillaFactions allows survival players to create, join, and edit teams without using the /team command (or any commands, for that matter). Features include:
- Choosing a custom team name.
- Choosing a team color from 16 options, with no restrictions on duplicate colors.
- Choosing a custom team prefix, which displays before player usernames in chat and nametags.
- Support for up to 32 teams in a server.

By default, teams prevent friendly fire between team members, and allows players to see their invisible team members.

![A screenshot from Minecraft. In-game, there is a line of 16 banners standing in a row. Each is a different color, and has text floating above it that states which color of team it represents. Each banner is on top of a Lodestone block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63b2ceeb4fe641614ea83cf2567e6b7f38d4de7e.png)

## Creating and Disbanding Factions

1. Make a Banner.
2. Give the Banner a custom name in an anvil. This will be the name of your Faction.
3. Place a Lodestone.
4. Whilst standing directly on top of the Lodestone, look down and place your Banner on top of it.

![A screenshot of the anvil menu from Minecraft. It displays a white banner with a red cross being renamed in the anvil to "The Red Cross".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bba24279349d5e4b8364697ab4b11cfbb72f2796.png)

A nametag should appear above the Banner stating your Faction's name. Additionally, a chat message will state that you have founded a Faction.

![A screenshot of a chat message in Minecraft. The message states, in yellow text, "ArcalRanem has founded the The Red Cross faction!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f12d556a14d4ab78f4d631b7288ea0a2f860ccb2.png)

To disband a Faction, simply destroy the Banner and/or the Lodestone beneath it. A chat message will announce that your Faction has disbanded.

![A screenshot of a chat message in Minecraft. The message states, in yellow text, "The Red Cross has been disbanded."](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41988035279f93b006cc5ec382eee3923789d09d.png)

## Joining and Leaving Factions

In order to join a Faction, simply attune a compass to the Lodestone beneath the Faction Banner. A message will be sent in chat to announce that you have joined the Faction.

![A screenshot of a chat message in Minecraft. The message states, in yellow text, "ArcalRanem has joined Purple Team". The words "Purple Team" are in purple.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceb1892d283655ebdcfa01d52788e11c7c942a36.png)

In order to leave a Faction, you must drop Shears on the Faction Banner. This will also send a message in chat.

![A screenshot of a chat message in Minecraft. The message states, in yellow text, "ArcalRanem has left Purple Team". The words "Purple Team" are in purple.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db716c94a2f2de40d8dccb07c1b0be5675360d35.png)

## Customizing your Faction

To change the color of your Faction (affecting player usernames in chat and in nametags, as well as the color of the Glowing effect), drop a piece of Dye on the Faction Banner. A message will be sent to your team notifying them of the change.

![A screenshot of a chat message in Minecraft. It is a team message, which displays that it is being sent to the Red Team, and reads "Your Faction's color has been changed to Red". Below that, there is another message from ArcalRanem, which states "Nice". ArcalRanem's username is red.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa78933a0e2f2b6db46d257bb9ee2fa43a8d0613.png)

To change the player prefix for your Faction (which displays before usernames in chat and nametags), use an anvil to name a nametag your desired prefix. Then, drop the nametag on the Faction Banner. A message will be sent to your team notifying them of the change. **Remember to include a space (or other delimiting character) after the prefix, or else there will be no separation between the prefix text and the username.**

![A screenshot of the anvil menu from Minecraft. It displays a nametag being renamed in the anvil to "Flamboyant ".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7597b417b516e9d2df3b9d49697377421fbbc007.png)

![A screenshot of a chat message in Minecraft. It is a team message, which displays that it is being sent to the Pink Team, and reads "Your Faction's player title has changed to 'Flamboyant '.". Below that, there is a message from "Flamboyant ArcalRanem", that states "Hello". The words "Flamboyant ArcalRanem" are pink.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ccf3e0342bd76c16eb6d333f385b43e004f5b34.png)
